tool_args.label: LIRR Long Island City Flood Wall Project

payload.project_name: Long Island City Flood Wall Project
payload.description: Perimeter flood wall with nine flood gates, three pumping stations, backup generators and relocated utilities at Long Island City station and yard to protect from storm surge

warnings: project.implementing_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Implementing agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

payload.description: Pilot to test the use of renewable diesel fuel in one of the yard locomotives, launched November 4, to reduce greenhouse emissions by up to 78% compared to traditional diesel

tool_args.label: Metro-North Siemens SC-42 Charger Locomotive Acquisition

payload.project_name: Metro-North Siemens SC-42 Charger Locomotive Acquisition
payload.description: 27-locomotive order (Board approved 2021) plus 6 for CT DOT, replacing 27 aging GE P32AC-DM Genesis locomotives. Compliant with Tier 4 environmental specs, cutting airborne emissions by over 85 percent. First two units unveiled at Harmon Shop on November 1.
payload.status: ongoing - first 2 delivered, remaining 31 arriving over next 3 years

warnings: project.partner_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Partner agency is relation context. Suggested relation: has_partner.

tool_args.label: MTA Runwise Boiler Monitoring Pilot and Expansion

payload.description: Three-year pilot program signed October 2023 for $350,000 to implement Runwise boiler management system at 7 MTA locations, with ratification to add 38 additional NYC Transit locations for $908,500 to remotely monitor boilers

Program to fill vacant retail units in the subway system with creative installations and cultural programming. Has activated 12 units in nine stations, working with over a dozen partners including the Whitney Museum of American Art and ChaShaMa
